Table.helpMultiSortDescription1: To sort by multiple columns at once, hold down the Shift key and click the headers of the columns you want to sort by.
Table.helpMultiSortDescription2:
The sorting priority will correspond to the order in which you click the columns, e.g.:

Clicking the Name column first, and then (holding Shift!) the Age column,

data will be sorted first by name, and then by age.
